operations.purpose: fill ground level (y=0) with dirt to create the pit floor base

1-block wide pedestal border at ground level constrained to bbox (replaces the previous outline that extended outside bbox)
clear interior ground-level space inside pedestal (entrance pit recessed)
interior floor: wooden planks front half (y=1) - leaves rest air above for interior height
interior floor: wooden planks back half (y=1)
optional sub-floor layer for slight thickness (1-block wooden floor layer at y=2 for visual layering)
clear building volume before building walls and details
stacked horizontal band walls from y=2 to y=5 within interior bbox
small corner vertical accents using stonebrick for stronger corners
place 1x1 glass pane windows centered in stonebrick band with 1-block stone vertical separators; applied to all four sides
entrance opening on the north side centered between pillars: a 2-wide, 3-high opening from y=2 to y=4
single stone slab step at entrance front on pedestal
stone slab coping/rim placed along the roof edge at top y=5 inset one block from outer wall (forms raised rim). Implemented as a ring by placing slabs on the perimeter coordinates of this bbox
fill recessed roof interior with wooden planks at y=5 (flat roof recessed 1 block from coping)
small cobblestone accents at the four roof corners embedded into the coping ring
ensure air above building to avoid collisions (clears up to y=10 within outer bbox)
